code:
sequenceDiagram
    title PHP Application Request Lifecycle
    
    participant Client as Client Browser
    participant Apache as Apache Server
    participant PHP as PHP-FPM
    participant index as index.php
    participant Request as HttpRequest
    participant Response as HttpResponse
    participant Session as Session
    participant Router as Router
    participant Route as Route
    participant Middleware as Middlewares
    participant Controller as Controller
    participant Model as Model
    participant DB as Database
    
    Client->>Apache: HTTP Request
    Apache->>PHP: Forward to PHP-FPM via socket
    PHP->>index: Execute index.php
    
    index->>index: Load autoloader
    index->>index: Load environment variables
    index->>Session: Create Session
    Session->>Session: Start session
    index->>Request: Create HttpRequest
    Request->>Request: Parse request data
    index->>Response: Create HttpResponse
    index->>Router: Create Router(Education_StudentDB)
    
    Router->>Router: Load routes from routes.json
    index->>Router: route(Education_StudentDB)
    
    Router->>Router: Get request method & URI
    Router->>Router: searchRoute(Education_StudentDB)
    Router->>Route: Create Route object
    Route->>Route: Parse route parameters
    Route->>Route: Load middlewares
    
    alt Route Found
        Router->>Middleware: Call entry middlewares
        Middleware->>Middleware: Execute pre-controller logic
        
        Router->>Controller: Instantiate controller
        Controller->>Controller: Initialize Twig
        Router->>Controller: Call action method
        
        Controller->>Model: Interact with model(Education_LMS_Portal)
        Model->>DB: Execute SQL queries
        DB->>Model: Return data
        Model->>Controller: Return processed data
        
        Controller->>Controller: Render template
        Controller->>Response: Append rendered content
        
        Router->>Middleware: Call exit middlewares
        Middleware->>Middleware: Execute post-controller logic
        
        Router->>Response: send(Education_LMS_Portal)
        Response->>PHP: Output HTTP response
    else Route Not Found
        Router->>Controller: Create ErrorController
        Controller->>Controller: error404(Education_ContentCDN)
        Controller->>Response: Append error page
        Router->>Response: send(Education_ContentCDN)
        Response->>PHP: Output HTTP response
    end
    
    PHP->>Apache: Return response
    Apache->>Client: HTTP Response

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个PHP应用请求的完整生命周期时序图，重点展示从Client Browser发请求到最终返回响应的完整链路。
明白了，那入口文件是index.php吗？还有，HttpRequest和HttpResponse这两个对象需要作为独立参与者画出来吗？
对，index.php是入口。HttpRequest和HttpResponse要画，它们承载请求数据和最终响应。另外Session也要独立出来，因为session启动是个关键节点。
好的，我先画出基础参与者：Client Browser、Apache Server、PHP-FPM、index.php，然后是HttpRequest、HttpResponse、Session。接下来是路由层吗？
路由层需要三个参与者：Router、Route、还有Middlewares。Router负责匹配，Route封装具体路由信息，Middlewares处理过滤逻辑。
收到，Router、Route、Middlewares都加上了。Controller和Model也要吧？最后还有Database。
没错。现在画消息流：Client Browser发HTTP Request到Apache Server，Apache通过socket转发给PHP-FPM执行index.php。
已画好前三步消息。index.php内部需要先加载autoloader和环境变量，然后创建Session并启动，这个自调用消息要体现出来吗？
要体现，Session的自调用start很重要。接着index.php创建HttpRequest并解析数据，同时创建HttpResponse备用。
好的，HttpRequest的自调用parse和HttpResponse的创建都画好了。接下来Router创建时要传入Education_StudentDB，然后从routes.json加载路由配置？
等等，routes.json加载应该是Router内部的自调用，不是从外部传入。还有，调用route方法匹配时也是传Education_StudentDB。
修正了，Router自调用load routes from routes.json，然后自调用get request method & URI和searchRoute。找到路由后创建Route对象，Route自调用parse parameters和load middlewares。
这里要画一个alt分支：Route Found和Route Not Found两种情况。正常流程先走Found分支。
alt分支已添加。Found分支里：Router调用entry middlewares，Middleware自调用pre-controller logic，然后Router实例化Controller并初始化Twig，再调用action方法。
Controller和Model交互时要标注Education_LMS_Portal，Model执行SQL查询后返回数据，Controller渲染模板并把内容append到HttpResponse。
画好了，Model和Database的交互、数据返回、模板渲染都齐了。然后Router调用exit middlewares执行post-controller逻辑，最后Router调用Response的send方法传Education_LMS_Portal，PHP输出HTTP响应。
Route Not Found分支也要补：Router创建ErrorController，调用error404方法并传入Education_ContentCDN，然后把错误页append到Response，同样走send和输出流程。
else分支完成了。最后PHP把响应返回给Apache，Apache再HTTP Response给Client Browser。整个生命周期闭环。
检查一遍：Education_StudentDB在Router创建和route调用时出现，Education_LMS_Portal在Controller-Model交互和send时出现，Education_ContentCDN在404错误处理时出现，三个教育业务场景都覆盖到了。没问题。
